message:
feat(tests): add property tests for app parsing, provider cost model, and session store hashing

src/app.rs: 14 proptests covering parse_models_arg (empty-string
rejection, whitespace trimming, round-trip, empty CSV), split_provider_model_spec
(first-slash semantics, whitespace, empty-half rejection, no-slash),
is_alias (latest suffix, 8-digit suffix, no-hyphen, non-ASCII safety),
and models_equal (reflexive, symmetric, different-provider, different-id).

src/provider.rs: 11 proptests covering calculate_cost (zero tokens,
non-negative, linearity, additivity), Api FromStr+Display round-trip
(custom, never-panics, empty-rejected), KnownProvider FromStr+Display
(custom round-trip, azure alias collapse, never-panics), and ModelCost
serde round-trip.

src/session_store_v2.rs: 10 proptests covering chain_hash_step
(64-hex output, determinism, non-commutativity, genesis differs),
crc32c_upper (8-uppercase-hex output, determinism, empty fixed-point,
single-bit sensitivity), and payload_hash_and_size (64-hex, determinism).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
